experiment: M1 feature-pool enrichment (~172 -> ~700 features: per-beat med/std/IQR/skew + sub-segments)
conclusion: REJECTED — does not lift M1 ceiling; M1 is signal-limited (the WPW delta wave breaks NeuroKit delineation, so adding features cannot raise the ceiling).
decision: Keep the simpler v1 pool as the canonical M1. The enriched pool ties v1 on OOF AP and is worse on AUC; apparent gains exist only at depth-3 / large-gap (memorization). Enriched feature table archived: data/processed/m1_features_enriched.csv (gitignored).
